agents.name: Pitch builder
agents.description: Builds investment banking pitch decks from company data + market context
agents.test_input: Build a sell-side teaser + pitch deck for a Chinese AI infra company (sample target: 浪潮信息 / 中科曙光)

agents.name: Meeting preparer
agents.description: Pre-meeting briefing pack: company overview, recent events, talking points
agents.test_input: Prepare an analyst meeting brief for NVDA pre-FY26Q1 earnings

agents.name: Earnings reviewer
agents.description: Quarterly earnings analysis with beats/misses, guidance, segment commentary
agents.test_input: Review NVDA latest quarter — flag surprises, guidance read-through, model implications

agents.name: Model builder
agents.description: Builds 3-statement / DCF / LBO models from company filings
agents.test_input: Build 3-statement model for 贵州茅台 (600519.SH) using last 5 years of annual reports

agents.name: Market researcher
agents.description: Industry / sector deep-dive with TAM, players, drivers, risks
agents.test_input: Sector report on China NEV market 2026 — competitive landscape, BYD / Li Auto / NIO positioning

agents.name: Valuation reviewer
agents.description: Audit existing valuation models for methodology consistency, comp selection, sensitivity
agents.test_input: Review a synthetic DCF model with 3 planted methodology errors (terminal growth > WACC, mismatched FCF, cherry-picked comps)

agents.name: General ledger reconciler
agents.description: Reconciles GL accounts vs sub-ledgers, flags variance, suggests adjusting entries
agents.test_input: Reconcile a synthetic 3-month GL with planted exceptions (timing diff, missing JE, dup posting)

agents.name: Month-end closer
agents.description: Drives the close cycle: accruals, reclasses, intercompany, FX
agents.test_input: Close a synthetic April 2026 month-end for a single-entity SaaS company

agents.name: Statement auditor
agents.description: Audits financial statements: tie-out, footing, ratio reasonableness, disclosure completeness
agents.test_input: Audit 茅台 2024 annual report financial statements — tie-out, ratio sanity, disclosure

agents.name: KYC screener
agents.description: Screens client onboarding files: identity, beneficial ownership, sanctions, PEP, adverse media
agents.test_input: Screen a synthetic onboarding pack: corporate, 3 UBOs, 1 PEP-adjacent
